def build_metric_name(customer, bucket):
    metric_name = "requests_total"
    counter(metric_name)
    return metric_name


def annotate_span(account, route_name):
    tracer.set_attribute("bucket", "success")
    tracer.set_attribute("route_group", route_name)


def process_items(items):
    for item in items:
        process(item)


def emit_metrics(total):
    counter.inc()


def health_ready():
    return {"status": "ok"}


def sync_records(order_id):
    logger.info("processing order", operation="sync_records")
    counter.inc(operation="sync_records")
    tracer.start_span(operation="sync_records")
    return order_id
